sutta: once when the exalted 1 was staying in the bamboo grove near kinbila the venerable kimbella approached him saluted and sat down at 1 side so seated he said lord what is the cause the reason why when the tata gather has become completely cool saddam or true dhamma will not last and the buddha said suppose kimbila when the tatargata has become completely cool the monks nuns lay men and lay women live without reverence without heat for the teacher live without reverence without heat for dhamma live without reverence without heat for the sangha live without reverence without heat for the training without reverence without heat for concentration live without reverence without heat for earnestness live without reverence without heed for good will verily kimbila this is the cause the reason why when the tata gather has become completely cool sat dhamma or true dharma will not last as the end of the suta
commentary: this is 1 of the sutas now where the causes for the disappearance of the true dhamma that means the discourses of the buddha are given and here we find us because people have no respect for the buddha instead of following the buddha they prefer to follow some other and then they have no reverence for the dhamma that means the discourses of the buddha because in the agutra nikaya 4.180 the buddha said that dhamma refers to the sutras the discourses and then the sangha is the bhikkhu sangha here it's not referring to the arya sangha because you don't know who's in arya who is not an arya but you know who is a monk who is not a monk so here means without reverence for the sangha of monks and possibly possibly because the monks do not follow their precepts so people lose faith lose respect for the monks and slowly that also causes the downfall of the true dhamma the training the training is the training means keeping the precepts generally and then for concentration no reverence for concentration this we can see nowadays where people say that samadhi which the buddha refers to as the jhanas or 1 pointedness of mind in the sutras they say is not necessary and then without reverence for good will good will omega is necessary if buddhists are to be united and in harmony and then the next utah is
